titles.en: True faith requires greater trust in God than in oneself
True faith requires greater trust in God than in oneself

segments: ٣١٠. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَا يَصْدُقُ إِيمَانُ عَبْدٍ، حَتّى يَكُونَ بِمَا فِي يَدِ اللهِ سُبْحَانَهُ أَوْثَقَ مِنهُ بِمَا فِي يَدِهِ.
arabic.text: ٣١٠. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَا يَصْدُقُ إِيمَانُ عَبْدٍ، حَتّى يَكُونَ بِمَا فِي يَدِ اللهِ سُبْحَانَهُ أَوْثَقَ مِنهُ بِمَا فِي يَدِهِ.

segments: 310. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The belief of a person cannot be regarded as true unless his trust in what is with Allāh is more than his trust in what he himself has.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 310. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: The belief of a person cannot be regarded as true unless his trust in what is with Allāh is more than his trust in what he himself has.
